title: Sri Vadaranyeswarar Temple
tagline: Sri Vadaranyeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Sri Vadaranyeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple in Thiruvalangadu, in Tiruvallur district of Tamil Nadu.India.
overview.description: Sri Vadaranyeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple in Thiruvalangadu, in Tiruvallur district of Tamil Nadu.India. It was built by the Cholas during the 12th century CE. It is one of the shrines of the 275 Paadal Petra Sthalams.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvalangadu
topPlaces.description: Thiruvalangadu is a village in the western suburbs of Chennai, India. The railway station is located on the Chennai-Arakkonam Route, the penultimate station before Arakkonam.

topPlaces.name: Panambakkam
topPlaces.description: Panambakkam is a village in western outskirts of Chennai located in Tiruvallur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Agriculture is the major occupation in this village.

topPlaces.name: Kaivandur
topPlaces.description: Kaivandur is a village in Tiruvallur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located between the town of Thiruvallur and the Thiruthani temple.

topPlaces.name: Senji, Chennai
topPlaces.description: Senji is a village in western outskirts of Chennai, located in Tiruvallur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Kadambathur block
topPlaces.description: Kadambathur block is a revenue block in the Tiruvallur district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 43 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Kadambathur
topPlaces.description: Kadambathur, also spelt Kadambattur, is a town located in Tiruvallur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is a census town in Tiruvallur taluk.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sri Vadaranyeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sri Vadaranyeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sri Vadaranyeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (45 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (54 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sri Vadaranyeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sri Vadaranyeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sri Vadaranyeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sri Vadaranyeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sri Vadaranyeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thiruvalangadu, Panambakkam, Kaivandur, Senji, Chennai, Kadambathur block.
